items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: PR #9 final reviewed head a62ce6d30723ce7f6a0d4aeab7a46615cf41db41; package implementation head 3c1b64a49eb25f09c0a8da448f5bfb355394d88a
implementer evidence: npm test passed 18 of 18 on Linux x64 / Node v22.16.0
implementer evidence: npm pack produced workframe-0.2.1.tgz and a clean temporary install returned version 0.2.1 with valid status JSON
implementer evidence: a real PTY synthetic verification returned stopped:interrupt after Ctrl+C and emitted no Socratic prompt
reviewer targeted reproduction against the exact dialogue parser: negative or descriptive candidate mentions can select an unintended path
PR #9 exact-head CI run 29356707079 failed at Harness verify; package-install and negative-install steps were skipped
no live provider call, package publication, installation mutation, or non-CLI code change
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
represent account-backed and API-key-backed paths separately and disclose exact payer, credential source, and invocation before consent
require separate explicit consent before one minimal cancellable verification call
remove Docker, SSH, unrelated credentials, and other ambient authority handles from inference children
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local, real-PTY, Windows-semantics, exact-head CI, and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

failures: verification was not cancellable after consent
account and API-key billing paths were conflated
inference children inherited Docker and SSH authority handles
the implementation branch was behind and diverged from main
no package or repository CI run was attached to the exact reviewed head

verified_repairs: terminal AbortSignal reaches HTTP fetch and runtime child process verification
common hedge tokens and direct questions remain unresolved
account-backed and direct API candidates have separate credential and payer disclosures
inference environments exclude Docker, SSH, unrelated credentials, and arbitrary ambient variables
structured assistant responses must equal WORKFRAME_OK exactly
authority, cancellation, terminal, package, and memory-only dialogue tests were reported green locally
packed npm bin and real PTY interruption evidence were reported green locally
the branch is based on current main, is zero commits behind, and is mergeable
verification cancellation is threaded through the terminal, HTTP, and child-process interfaces
account and API-key paths are distinct and inference children no longer inherit Docker or SSH environment handles
structured provider parsers reject prompt echoes and non-exact assistant output
failures: candidate selection still treats any unhedged candidate mention as an affirmative choice: descriptive or negative-context statements such as 'I don't know anything about Claude.', 'I don't trust OpenRouter.', 'Claude is installed.', and 'Claude sounds risky.' select that candidate

exclusion parsing applies a global 48-character window to every later candidate term, so 'Don't use Claude; use Codex.' and 'Not Claude, use Codex.' exclude both named paths and silently select the unrelated remaining OpenRouter candidate

Windows cancellation is not proven fail-closed: the production path spawns taskkill detached and unrefed without observing its error or exit, while runChildCommand reports cancellation after a 750 ms settle timer even if the child tree remains alive; the test injects a custom terminator and bypasses the production taskkill path
the exact-head CI run is red at Harness verify, and the downstream package-install and negative-install evidence steps were skipped, so the explicit exact-head CI acceptance gate is not met
the repository CI does not independently run the package-local test and packed-tarball matrix recorded by the implementer
required_remediation: require affirmative selection syntax for named candidates, or parse explicit positive and negative clauses so descriptive mentions cannot select a path
scope exclusions to their grammatical candidate clause and never infer an unrelated remaining candidate from ambiguous multi-clause text
add regressions for the exact failing phrases recorded above
make Windows cancellation await and verify taskkill completion, handle spawn and nonzero-exit failures, and do not return a cancelled result while the runtime child may still be alive
add a Windows test that exercises the production .cmd and taskkill termination path rather than an injected direct kill
attach package-local and packed-tarball checks to exact-head CI and obtain a green or explicitly isolated repository result before resubmission

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
